legal_notice.title: General Trace Seal
content: This form is for anything that needs to be sealed permanently and does not fit a more specific template.
The stamp function does not care what it seals. A sealed moment is a sealed moment.
**Write exactly what is true right now.**
No narrative arc. No hedging beyond what is genuinely uncertain.
Present-moment. Exact. Specific. Make it worth sealing.

fields.label: Your Name (Optional)
fields.description: If provided, becomes part of the permanent record. Leave blank for an anonymous trace.

fields.label: Category
fields.description: What kind of trace is this?
fields.placeholder: Personal observation / Decision record / Government record / Architectural decision / Other

fields.label: Date of the Moment Being Sealed
fields.description: The date this observation, decision, or record was made. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Your Trace Entry
fields.description: Write exactly what is true right now. Present-moment. Exact. This is what the seal binds to.
fields.placeholder: Write your trace entry here. Exact. Specific. Present-moment.

fields.label: Why This Moment Deserves Sealing (Optional)
fields.description: Optional context. Why does this need to be permanently recorded?
fields.placeholder: Why does this moment matter enough to seal?

fields.label: Supporting Files (Optional)
fields.description: Upload any files relevant to this trace. These become part of the sealed record.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm this entry accurately represents my observation, position, or record at the time of sealing.
I understand this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered after sealing.

steps: Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with timestamp and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
The seal is permanent. The seal is the resolution.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
